```curt
s = "aaabbcccca"
result = ""
i = 0
while i < s.len {
  ch = s[i]
  count = 1
  while i + count < s.len && s[i + count] == ch {
    count += 1
  }
  result += ch + (count.str)
  i += count
}
print result
```

```
vowels = s | .lower | .chars | filter c -> "aeiou" | contains c
print vowels | .len
```


```
s = "the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog"
count = 0
for c in (s | .chars)
  if ("aeiou" | contains c)
    count += 1
print count
```

```
a = 252
b = 105
while b != 0 {
  temp = b
  b = a % b
  a = temp
}
print a
```

```curt
to_binary n = if n == 0 { "0" } else { result = "" | while n > 0 { result = (n % 2 | str) + result; n = n / 2 } | result }

print (to_binary 13)
print (to_binary 64)
```

```curt
to_binary n =
  if n == 0 { "0" } else {
    result = ""
    x = n
    while x > 0 {
      result = ((x % 2) | str) + result
      x = x / 2
    }
    result
  }

print (to_binary 13)
print (to_binary 64)
```

```curt
items = [
  {name: "widget", qty: 4, price: 2.5},
  {name: "gizmo", qty: 2, price: 7.25},
  {name: "bolt", qty: 10, price: 0.1}
]

totals = items | map i -> {name: i["name"], total: i["qty"] * i["price"]}

grand = totals | map t -> t["total"] | sum
print grand

max_item = totals | sort t -> t["total"] | last
print max_item["name"]
```

```curt
s = "the cat sat on the mat with the cat"
words = s.lower.split " "
counts = words.counts
sorted = counts | keys | sort
print "{sorted.last} {counts[sorted.last]}"
print "{sorted[-2]} {counts[sorted[-2]]}"
```

```curt
collatz n =
  if n == 1 { 0 } else { 1 + collatz (if n % 2 == 0 { n / 2 } else { 3 * n + 1 }) }

steps = range 1 11 | map n -> (n, collatz n)
max_pair = steps | sort (a, b) -> b.1 - a.1 | first
print "{max_pair.0} {max_pair.1} steps"
```

```curt
describe v = match v {
  i: int -> "int {i + 1}",
  f: float -> "float {f}",
  s: str -> "str {s.len}"
}

print describe(42)
print describe(3.5)
print describe("abc")
```

```curt
s = "pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs"
words = s.split " "
longest = words | sort (w1 w2 -> w2.len - w1.len) | first
avg = (words | map w -> w.len | sum) / words.len
print longest
print avg.int
```

```curt
vals = ["12", "x", "7", "-", "30"]
parsed = vals | map v -> (v.int ? 0)
unparseable = vals | map v -> (v.int ? "err") | map x -> (x == "err") | sum
print (parsed | sum)
print unparseable
```

```curt
vals = ["12", "x", "7", "-", "30"]
parsed = vals | map v -> (v.int ? 0)
unparseable = vals | map v -> (match v.int { err e -> 1, n -> 0 }) | sum
print (parsed | sum)
print unparseable
```

```curt
ages = [34, -2, 19, 150, 42, 27]
valid = ages | filter a -> a >= 0 && a <= 120
invalid = ages | filter a -> a < 0 || a > 120

print (valid.len)
print (invalid.len)
print (valid | sum)
```

```curt
fs.read "users.txt"
| .lines
| map line -> {
    parts = line | .split " "
    name = parts.0
    age = parts.1 | .int
    if age > 25 { name } else { "" }
  }
| filter x -> x != ""
| .join " "
| print
```

```curt
lines = fs.read "users.txt" | .lines
names = lines | map line -> {
  parts = line | .split " "
  name = parts.0
  age = parts.1 | .int
  if age > 25 { name } else { "" }
} | filter x -> x != ""
result = names | .join " "
print result
```

```curt
config = fs.read "app.cfg" | .json
orders = fs.read "orders.json" | .json

paid = orders | filter x -> x.paid
count = paid.len
total = paid | map x -> x.amount | sum

print "{config.name}: {count} paid, total {total}"
```

```curt
config = fs.read "app.cfg" | .json
orders = fs.read "orders.json" | .json
```

```curt
paid = orders | map x -> (if x.paid { x.amount } else { 0 })
count = paid | map x -> (if x > 0 { 1 } else { 0 }) | sum
total = paid | sum

print "{config.name}: {count} paid, total {total}"
```
